mapper.select: select * from ai_message where session_id = #{sessionId} order by create_time asc
mapper.insert: insert into ai_message(session_id, user_id, role, content, create_time) values(#{sessionId}, #{userId}, #{role}, #{content}, #{createTime})
mapper.select: select * from ai_message where session_id = #{sessionId} order by create_time asc
